name: hrcoc-finance
description: HRCOC Church Finance Transparency & Management System

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx knex migrate:rollback --all && npx knex migrate:latest && npx knex seed:run
